subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Garrett of Boston in Sept. 1911
subcodes.first_line: Convey to the friends in Boston affectionate greetings, and tell them that though I am in London, my heart and soul are with them.
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
